question_tagalog: Ano yung definition mo ng 'financial freedom'?
question_english: What is your definition of 'financial freedom'?
quote_tagalog: Ang pera ay para sa peace of mind, hindi para mas lalong ma-stress.
quote_english: Money is for peace of mind, not to get more stressed.

question_tagalog: Paano mo gusto hina-handle natin yung expenses pag lumalabas tayo?
question_english: How do you want us to handle expenses when we go out?
quote_tagalog: Partnership din natin 'to, pati sa mga bayarin.
quote_english: This is our partnership, even in bills.

question_tagalog: Anong pangarap mong business or investment sa future?
question_english: What is your dream business or investment in the future?
quote_tagalog: Sabay tayong yayaman at aasenso.
quote_english: We will get rich and progress together.

question_tagalog: Ano yung pinaka-malaking purchase mo para sa sarili mo this year?
question_english: What is your biggest purchase for yourself this year?
quote_tagalog: Deserve mong i-treat ang sarili mo paminsan-minsan.
quote_english: You deserve to treat yourself sometimes.

question_tagalog: Ano yung best financial advice na natutunan mo sa parents mo?
question_english: What is the best financial advice you learned from your parents?
quote_tagalog: Mag-ipon para sa kinabukasan na hindi sigurado.
quote_english: Save for the uncertain future.

question_tagalog: Paano mo sine-save yung portion ng sweldo mo every month?
question_english: How do you save a portion of your salary every month?
quote_tagalog: Kahit maliit, pag naipon ay lumalaki rin.
Even if small, when saved it grows too.

question_tagalog: Anong mga lifestyle choices mo ngayon ang nakadagdag sa savings mo?
question_english: What lifestyle choices of yours now added to your savings?
quote_tagalog: Ang pagiging praktikal ay hindi pagdadamot.
quote_english: Being practical is not being stingy.

question_tagalog: Ano gusto mong approach natin sa 'joint account' balang araw?
question_english: What approach do you want with a 'joint account' someday?
quote_tagalog: Ang transparency ay susi sa magandang usapang pera.
quote_english: Transparency is key to good money talks.

question_tagalog: Nakaka-stress ba sayo kapag napag-uusapan natin yung budget natin?
question_english: Is it stressful for you when we discuss our budget?
quote_tagalog: Pag-usapan nang mahinahon para maayos lahat.
quote_english: Talk calmly to fix everything.

question_tagalog: Ano yung greatest career goal mo bago ka mag-retire?
question_english: What is your greatest career goal before you retire?
quote_tagalog: Suportahan kita sa lahat ng career moves mo.
quote_english: I'll support you in all your career moves.

question_tagalog: Kung manalo tayo sa lotto ngayon, ano yung bibilhin mo una?
question_english: If we win the lottery today, what will you buy first?
quote_tagalog: Libre mangarap, baka sakaling matupad.
quote_english: Dreaming is free, maybe it will come true.

question_tagalog: Anong utang or financial burden yung pinaka-gusto mo na matapos?
question_english: What debt or financial burden do you most want to finish?
quote_tagalog: Darating ang araw na fully paid na lahat yan.
quote_english: The day will come when all that is fully paid.

question_tagalog: Bakit important sayo yung may sariling ipon kahit mag-asawa na tayo?
question_english: Why is it important to you to have your own savings even when we're married?
quote_tagalog: Para sa security ng bawat isa and para sa pamilya.
quote_english: For the security of each other and for the family.

question_tagalog: Anong bagay ang feeling mo hindi sayang gastusan ng malaki?
question_english: What thing do you feel is not a waste to spend big on?
quote_tagalog: Ang experience and memories ay walang presyo.
quote_english: Experience and memories have no price.

question_tagalog: Anong opinion mo sa pagpapautang sa friends or relatives?
question_english: What's your opinion on lending money to friends or relatives?
quote_tagalog: Magpahiram lang ng halagang kayang mawala.
quote_english: Only lend the amount you can afford to lose.

question_tagalog: Naiisip mo ba na mag-retire ng maaga someday? What's your plan?
question_english: Do you think of retiring early someday? What's your plan?
quote_tagalog: Ang pahinga na deserving natin after hard work.
quote_english: The rest we deserve after hard work.

question_tagalog: Kung pareho tayong nawalan ng trabaho, paano tayo mag-aadjust?
question_english: If we both lost our jobs, how would we adjust?
quote_tagalog: Kahit walang-wala, basta magkasama tayong babangon.
quote_english: Even with nothing, as long as we rise together.

question_tagalog: Ano yung dream house at location na gusto mong bilhin natin?
question_english: What is the dream house and location you want us to buy?
quote_tagalog: Kahit gaano kaliit yan, the home is us.
quote_english: No matter how small, the home is us.

question_tagalog: Paano mo nililimitahan yung 'luho' or wants mo monthly?
question_english: How do you limit your 'luxuries' or wants monthly?
quote_tagalog: Learn to delay gratification for bigger rewards.
quote_english: Learn to delay gratification for bigger rewards.

question_tagalog: May nagawa ka bang financial mistake na natuto ka ng sobra?
question_english: Did you make a financial mistake that you learned so much from?
quote_tagalog: Charge to experience, wag nang uulitin.
quote_english: Charge to experience, don't repeat.

question_tagalog: Paano mo gustong pag-usapan yung finances if ever magkaproblema tayo?
question_english: How do you want to discuss finances if ever we have a problem?
quote_tagalog: Open communication para hindi mag-away sa pera.
quote_english: Open communication to avoid fighting over money.

question_tagalog: Sa tingin mo, financially ready na ba tayo na bumuo ng pamilya?
question_english: Do you think we are financially ready to build a family?
quote_tagalog: Paghahandaan natin nang maayos ang bright future.
quote_english: We will prepare properly for a bright future.

question_tagalog: Paano ide-divide yung budget for needs, savings, and wants?
question_english: How to divide the budget for needs, savings, and wants?
quote_tagalog: Balance lang para hindi deprived sa buhay.
quote_english: Just a balance so as not to be deprived in life.

question_tagalog: Naramdaman mo na ba na na-insecure ka financially among your peers?
question_english: Have you felt insecure financially among your peers?
quote_tagalog: Lahat tayo may sarili-sariling timeline ng success.
quote_english: We all have our own success timelines.

question_tagalog: Mas gusto mo bang empleyado tayo or magtayo ng sariling negosyo?
question_english: Do you prefer us to be employees or to build our own business?
quote_tagalog: Kahit anong path, magtulungan tayo palagi.
quote_english: Whatever path, let's always help each other.

question_tagalog: Anong pinakamagandang regalo ang binigay mo sa sarili mo this year?
question_english: What's the best gift you gave to yourself this year?
quote_tagalog: Self-reward paminsan-minsan is good for the soul.
quote_english: Self-reward sometimes is good for the soul.

question_tagalog: Kung magiging mayaman tayo, sino unang tutulungan mo sa family mo?
question_english: If we become rich, who will you help first in your family?
quote_tagalog: Ang mag-give back ay laging may balik na blessings.
quote_english: Giving back always brings returning blessings.

question_tagalog: Paano mo ide-describe yung attitude mo towards investing?
question_english: How would you describe your attitude towards investing?
quote_tagalog: Slowly but surely tayo sa investment.
quote_english: We go slowly but surely in investing.

question_tagalog: Sino nag-iinspire sayo na magsumikap lalo sa work or business?
question_english: Who inspires you to work harder in your job or business?
quote_tagalog: Ang pamilya at future ang laging motivation.
quote_english: Family and future are always the motivation.

question_tagalog: Comfortable ka ba na malaman ko kung magkano exact salary mo?
question_english: Are you comfortable with me knowing your exact salary?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang tinatago sa taong pinagkakatiwalaan.
quote_english: Nothing to hide from the person you trust.

question_tagalog: Ano yung habit mo na magastos pero di mo mapigilan?
question_english: What is a spending habit of yours that you can't stop?
quote_tagalog: Bawas-bawas muna pag may time.
quote_english: Reduce it when you have time.

question_tagalog: Paano natin is-set ang boundaries financially pag may hinihingi ang iba?
question_english: How do we set boundaries financially when others ask?
quote_tagalog: Mahirap humindi, pero kailangan para sa atin.
quote_english: It's hard to say no, but needed for us.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo bang mag-budget tayong dalawa every payday?
question_english: Do you want us to budget together every payday?
quote_tagalog: Sabay natin ididiskarte ang pera natin.
quote_english: We will strategize our money together.

question_tagalog: Ano yung opinion mo tungkol sa pre-nuptial agreements?
question_english: What is your opinion about pre-nuptial agreements?
quote_tagalog: Mas maganda yung malinaw bago ang kasal.
quote_english: It's better to be clear before marriage.

question_tagalog: Feeling mo ba pareho tayo ng mindset regarding money?
question_english: Do you feel we have the same mindset regarding money?
quote_tagalog: Kahit magkaiba, pwede pa rin tayo mag-compromise.
quote_english: Even if different, we can still compromise.

question_tagalog: Paano natin isi-celebrate yung financial milestones natin as a couple?
question_english: How will we celebrate our financial milestones as a couple?
quote_tagalog: Kahit simpleng dinner, basta achieved yung goal.
quote_english: Even a simple dinner, as long as the goal is achieved.

question_tagalog: Sa anong edad mo gustong completely debt-free na tayo?
question_english: At what age do you want us to be completely debt-free?
quote_tagalog: Lahat ng utang matatapos din.
quote_english: All debts will eventually end.

question_tagalog: Sino mas magastos sa atin and paano yun mababago?
question_english: Who is the bigger spender among us and how can that change?
quote_tagalog: Tutulungan kitang mag-ipon nang tama.
quote_english: I will help you save correctly.

question_tagalog: Anong bansa or place yung gusto natin i-travel once financially ready na?
question_english: Which country or place do we want to travel to once financially ready?
quote_tagalog: Ang mundo ay malaki, i-explore natin together.
quote_english: The world is big, let's explore it together.

question_tagalog: Paano tayo magho-hold accountable sa isa't isa if may impulse buying?
question_english: How will we hold each other accountable for impulse buying?
quote_tagalog: Isipin nang ilang beses bago mag labas ng pera.
quote_english: Think multiple times before releasing money.

question_tagalog: Naniniwala ka ba na 'money can't buy happiness'?
question_english: Do you believe that 'money can't buy happiness'?
quote_tagalog: It doesn't buy happiness, but it buys comfort.
quote_english: It doesn't buy happiness, but it buys comfort.

question_tagalog: Paano ko mai-improve yung saving habits ko based sa observation mo?
question_english: How can I improve my saving habits based on your observation?
quote_tagalog: Minsan disiplina lang talaga.
quote_english: Sometimes it just really takes discipline.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo ba magkaroon tayo ng financial advisor para sa future natin?
question_english: Do you want us to have a financial advisor for our future?
quote_tagalog: Magandang may guide para hindi tayo maligaw.
quote_english: It's good to have a guide so we don't get lost.

question_tagalog: Kung magtatayo tayo ng negosyo, anong klaseng negosyo?
question_english: If we were to build a business, what kind of business?
quote_tagalog: Ang passion natin gawin nating profit.
quote_english: Let's turn our passion into profit.

question_tagalog: Ano yung biggest fear mo pagdating sa pagkawala ng pera?
question_english: What is your biggest fear when it comes to losing money?
quote_tagalog: Laging may paraan basta magtulungan.
quote_english: There is always a way as long as we help each other.

question_tagalog: Paano natin maiwasang mag-away dahil sa kapos sa budget?
question_english: How can we avoid arguing due to being short on budget?
quote_tagalog: Intindihin at humanap ng extra income kung kailangan.
quote_english: Understand and look for extra income if needed.

question_tagalog: Kung biglang umangat yung career nung isa satin at yung isa hindi, pano natin iha-handle?
question_english: If one of our careers suddenly takes off and the other doesn't, how do we handle it?
quote_tagalog: Suportahan imbes na ma-insecure.
quote_english: Support instead of getting insecure.

question_tagalog: Ano ang views mo about buying branded items versus unbranded?
question_english: What are your views about buying branded items versus unbranded?
quote_tagalog: Quality over brand palagi.
quote_english: Quality over brand always.

question_tagalog: Paano natin i-eexplain sa mga anak natin ang value of money in the future?
question_english: How will we explain the value of money to our kids in the future?
quote_tagalog: Turuan sila habang bata pa.
quote_english: Teach them while they're young.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo ba tayong kumuha ng insurance for peace of mind?
question_english: Do you want us to get insurance for peace of mind?
quote_tagalog: Protection sa sarili at sa pamilya.
quote_english: Protection for oneself and family.

question_tagalog: Kung may biglaan na emergency expense, saan tayo kukuha?
question_english: If there's a sudden emergency expense, where will we get it?
quote_tagalog: Kaya dapat laging may emergency fund.
quote_english: That's why there should always be an emergency fund.

question_tagalog: Anong investment yung pinaka-confident ka na i-try natin soon?
question_english: Which investment are you most confident for us to try soon?
quote_tagalog: Let your money work for you.
quote_english: Let your money work for you.

question_tagalog: Naranasan mo na ba na walang-wala ka talagang ipon? Anong lesson doon?
question_english: Have you experienced having absolutely zero savings? What was the lesson there?
quote_tagalog: Minsan sa gipit tayo natututo ng hard lesson.
quote_english: Sometimes in hardship we learn a hard lesson.

question_tagalog: Paano natin iha-handle if may friends na madalas humiram pero di nagbabayad?
question_english: How will we handle friends who often borrow but don't pay?
quote_tagalog: Minsan kailangan nating wag mamihasa ang iba.
quote_english: Sometimes we need to stop enabling others.

question_tagalog: Are you a 'live in the moment' spender or an 'over-saver'?
question_english: Are you a 'live in the moment' spender or an 'over-saver'?
quote_tagalog: Laging may gitna para hindi ka ma-burnout mag-ipon.
quote_english: There's always a middle ground so you don't burn out from saving.

question_tagalog: Kung ikakasal tayo bukas, anong budget ang tingin mo makatotohanan sa life natin ngayon?
question_english: If we get married tomorrow, what budget do you think is realistic for our life now?
quote_tagalog: Pagmamahal ang importante, hindi ang engrandeng handa.
quote_english: Love is important, not the grand preparation.

question_tagalog: Bakit nahihirapan ang iba maging open sa partner nila about utang?
question_english: Why is it hard for some to be open to their partner about debt?
quote_tagalog: Ang nahihiyang umamin ay natatakot husgahan.
quote_english: The one shy to admit is afraid of being judged.

question_tagalog: Ano ang maituturing mo na 'best investment' mo right now?
question_english: What do you consider to be your 'best investment' right now?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw at ang pamilya natin ang the best investment.
quote_english: You and our family are the best investment.

question_tagalog: Pano mo sina-stop yung sarili mo pag naiisipang 'deserve ko to' pero bawal pa sa budget?
question_english: How do you stop yourself when thinking 'I deserve this' but it's not in the budget yet?
quote_tagalog: Ipagpaliban ngayon, para mas maginhawa bukas.
quote_english: Delay it now, for a more comfortable tomorrow.

question_tagalog: Ready ka bang lumaban sa hirap ng buhay basta't ikaw ang kasama ko?
question_english: Are you ready to fight the hardships of life as long as I am with you?
quote_tagalog: Sabay nating aayusin ang financial na estado ng isa't isa.
quote_english: We will fix each other's financial status together.
